meaning: adv.<古>以前,往昔地adj.以前的,往昔的
examples: He fled to Brazil with Gloria Lopez, an erstwhile friend of his wife's.
His erstwhile friends turned against him.
Behura was brought in from Raja's erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests.
Indeed, destroying Ms Tymoshenko, his erstwhile orange colleague, seems now to be Mr Yushchenko's only goal.
There is no more powerful alienation than that of the displaced from his erstwhile peers.
